Title: The Dryad's Crown (Tales from Efre Ousel, #1)
Author: David  Hopkins
My Review: Hopkins ability to create a world and characters is absolutely amazing. The characters and locations are so vivid that you're left feeling like you know these places and these people as well as you do your own hometown. The storytelling is fresh, well paced, and draws you along through the entire book without a lull.
